summary: Protected dashboard shell that requires an authenticated Appwrite user and displays server-checked general account and billing status.
responsibilities: Redirect unauthenticated visitors to /signin once loading completes.
Show loading copy while auth state is being initialized.
Allow the current user to sign out and return to /signin.
Request local SQL user profile and free or paid billing state from the billing status API.
Display the verified plan and local user details in a General section.
Let free authenticated users start Pro checkout from the dashboard.
Avoid repeated automatic billing status requests after a failure; users may retry manually.
Temporarily show bounded billing status endpoint error details for production debugging.
invariants: Dashboard content must remain gated by AuthContext user state.
Unauthenticated users must be redirected to /signin after loading is false.
Sign out must call AuthContext logout before navigating to /signin.
Plan display must show free by default unless the verified server billing API returns paid.
Local SQL user details must come from the verified billing status API response, not client-provided state.
Checkout controls must call AuthContext startCheckout and redirect only to the server-returned Stripe Checkout URL.
A failed billing status request must not create an automatic retry loop.
Temporary endpoint error details must be removed after production billing status debugging is complete.
